scripts.db:generate: bash -lc 'set -a; source ./.env; set +a; cd apps/backend && bun run db:generate'
scripts.db:migrate: bash -lc 'set -a; source ./.env; set +a; cd apps/backend && bun run db:migrate'
scripts.db:seed: bash -lc 'set -a; source ./.env; set +a; cd apps/backend && bun run db:seed'

x-doc.tujuan: Workspace root monorepo fase 0 untuk menjalankan backend, frontend, dan shared package.
x-doc.caller: Developer lokal, Bun workspace runner, Docker workflow.
x-doc.mainFunctions: Mendefinisikan workspace dan script utama lintas fase termasuk command database yang mewarisi root .env.
x-doc.sideEffects: Menjalankan dev server, build, dan command database lintas package.
